full_text:
Mohamed Nasser Sheikhon

Cairo, Nasr City, Zahraa Madinet Nasr | +201022752938 | LinkedIn GitHub | mohamednasserr654@gmail.com

OBJECTIVE

Backend Developer with a strong foundations in computer science and practical experience in building
applications using ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, and SQL Server. Skilled in designing scalable APIs,
integrating databases, and delivering efficient backend solutions. Passionate about backend architecture,
performance optimization, and contributing to impactful software projects.

EDUCATION

Ain Shams University – Faculty of Computer and Information Science
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (Major: Computer Science)
Expected Graduation: July 2026
CGPA: 3.4

INTERNSHIP EXPERIENCE | EJADA Egypt – Backend (Offshore Support & Demand Center) Intern
Ejada, Almazah, Cairo Aug 2025 – Sep 2025


Developed and maintained backend services and web applications using Java, Spring Boot, Spring Security, and
RESTful APIs, ensuring secure and scalable system design.

Leveraged JPA, Hibernate, and Microservices architecture to build scalable, high-performance backend modules
with efficient data handling and persistence.

Information Technology Institute (ITI) – Web Development using ASP.NET Core MVC Intern
Online Sep 2025 – Oct 2025 
Completed a practical internship focused on ASP.NET Core MVC Web Development using C#, Entity Framework
Core, and SQL Server.

Gained hands-on experience in building dynamic, data-driven web applications by applying concepts of MVC
architecture, dependency injection, database design, and authentication & authorization.

Applied SOLID principles, clean code practices, and layered architecture to ensure scalability, maintainability,
and high-quality software design.

TRAINING & COURSES | Ain Shams University
Android Development Intern (Summer Training) Aug 2025 – Sep 2025
Built a mobile application using Java and Android SDK as part of the training program.

Web Development Intern (Summer Training) Aug 2024 – Sep 2024
Developed a web project using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as part of the training program.

PROJECTS

 Map Routing Project (C#): Applied graph algorithms (shortest path) with a focus on time complexity optimization for efficient route calculation.
 Pac-Man Game (C++): Built using Graph and SFML, applying data structures and BFS algorithm, with basic AI techniques for enemy behavior.
 Operating System (C): Designed and developed operating system modules covering memory management, process scheduling, and concurrency control with locks.
 Library Management System (Java): Developed using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to manage books, users, and transactions.
 Flight Reservation DBMS Project (SQL): Developed a relational database system to handle flight bookings, passenger information, and scheduling.
 Gym Website (HTML , CSS , JS): Developed a responsive website showcasing gym services and membership features.
 Sentiment Analysis Classification (Python): Implemented using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to classify text based on sentiment.
 Connect-4 Game (C++): Implemented game logic, win detection algorithms, and integrated audio effects for an enhanced gameplay experience.
 Video Game Sales Prediction (Python): Applied Machine Learning algorithms to analyze datasets and predict video game sales based on features such as genre, platform, and region.
 Tiny Compiler (C#): Developed a compiler for the Tiny language in C#, including lexical analysis, parsing, and code generation.
 E-Commerce Website (Java, Spring Boot, Microservices): Developed the backend of an e-commerce platform, implementing REST APIs, product and order management, and a scalable microservices
architecture.
 University Management System (ASP.NET Core MVC): Enabled the management of students, instructors, and courses with defined roles and access levels for each user type. Implemented key
features such as user registration and login, CRUD operations, role-based access control, and data
management using Entity Framework Core.

SKILLS

Programming & Frameworks: C++, C#, Java, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, Spring Boot, Microservices,
Python
Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL
Core Concepts: REST APIs, OOP, Data Structures, Algorithms, Problem Solving
Soft Skills: Teamwork, Leadership, Time Management, Networking Fundamentals

LANGUAGES

Arabic (Native)
English (Very good)

pages.text:
PROJECTS
 Map Routing Project (C#): Applied graph algorithms (shortest path) with a focus on time complexity optimization for efficient route calculation.
 Pac-Man Game (C++): Built using Graph and SFML, applying data structures and BFS algorithm, with basic AI techniques for enemy behavior.
 Operating System (C): Designed and developed operating system modules covering memory management, process scheduling, and concurrency control with locks.
 Library Management System (Java): Developed using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to manage books, users, and transactions.
 Flight Reservation DBMS Project (SQL): Developed a relational database system to handle flight bookings, passenger information, and scheduling.
 Gym Website (HTML , CSS , JS): Developed a responsive website showcasing gym services and membership features.
 Sentiment Analysis Classification (Python): Implemented using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to classify text based on sentiment.
 Connect-4 Game (C++): Implemented game logic, win detection algorithms, and integrated audio effects for an enhanced gameplay experience.
 Video Game Sales Prediction (Python): Applied Machine Learning algorithms to analyze datasets and predict video game sales based on features such as genre, platform, and region.
 Tiny Compiler (C#): Developed a compiler for the Tiny language in C#, including lexical analysis, parsing, and code generation.
 E-Commerce Website (Java, Spring Boot, Microservices): Developed the backend of an e-commerce platform, implementing REST APIs, product and order management, and a scalable microservices
architecture.
 University Management System (ASP.NET Core MVC): Enabled the management of students, instructors, and courses with defined roles and access levels for each user type. Implemented key
features such as user registration and login, CRUD operations, role-based access control, and data
management using Entity Framework Core.
SKILLS
Programming & Frameworks: C++, C#, Java, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, Spring Boot, Microservices,
Python
Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL
Core Concepts: REST APIs, OOP, Data Structures, Algorithms, Problem Solving
Soft Skills: Teamwork, Leadership, Time Management, Networking Fundamentals
LANGUAGES
Arabic (Native)
English (Very good)

 Map Routing Project (C#): Applied graph algorithms (shortest path) with a focus on time complexity optimization for efficient route calculation.

 Operating System (C): Designed and developed operating system modules covering memory management, process scheduling, and concurrency control with locks.
 Library Management System (Java): Developed using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to manage books, users, and transactions.

 Sentiment Analysis Classification (Python): Implemented using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to classify text based on sentiment.
 Connect-4 Game (C++): Implemented game logic, win detection algorithms, and integrated audio effects for an enhanced gameplay experience.
 Video Game Sales Prediction (Python): Applied Machine Learning algorithms to analyze datasets and predict video game sales based on features such as genre, platform, and region.
 Tiny Compiler (C#): Developed a compiler for the Tiny language in C#, including lexical analysis, parsing, and code generation.

architecture.

features such as user registration and login, CRUD operations, role-based access control, and data
management using Entity Framework Core.

product catalog, shopping cart, order management, secure user authentication
using ASP.NET Core Identity, and implementation using N-Tier Architecture. • Tools: ASP.NET Core MVC, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Visual
Studio.

Courses

normalized_blocks.text:
.NET Core MVC - [E-commerce], Udemy
Complete ASP.NET Core MVC (.NET 8) & Razor Course – Udemy Learned the
fundamentals and project structure of ASP.NET Core MVC and Razor. Gained hands-
on experience building two full projects with Entity Framework Core (Code-First),
ASP.NET Core Identity with role management, authentication & authorization,
custom Tag Helpers, View Components, sessions, TempData, and Bootstrap v5.
Implemented Stripe payments, email notifications, repository pattern, and
deployed projects to Microsoft Azure.

normalized_blocks.text:
Mastering ASP.NET Core: Concepts to Production-Ready APIs,
Essam AbdelNabi (Metigator)
Completed a structured course covering the full ASP.NET Core API development
lifecycle, from fundamentals to advanced concepts. Gained hands-on experience in
building production-ready APIs, implementing authentication, authorization, and
API security, and applying best practices for scalable, secure, and maintainable
backend systems. The course included step-by-step exercises and practical projects
to strengthen both understanding and real-world application.

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Motivated Computer Science student and Back-End Developer with experience building APIs, managing
databases, and developing secure server-side applications. Equipped with solid frontend knowledge and
problem-solving skills, allowing effective contribution across the full development cycle. Committed to writing
clean, efficient, and reliable code.

sections.heading: Education
sections.content:
Ain Shams University - Faculty of Computer and Information Sciences,
Bachelor's in Information Systems
2022 – 2026
Cairo , Egypt
• GPA: 3.0/4.0 • Coursework: Algorithms Analysis & Design, Object oriented programming,
Database Management System, Data structures, Operating System, System
Analysis & Design, Software Engineering, Web Development, Design Patterns,
Computer Networks

sections.heading: Languages
sections.content:
C, C++, C#, Java, Java Script, Type Script, Python,
SQL, HTML, CSS
Version Control
Git, GitHub

sections.heading: Skills
sections.content:
Technologies
Technical Concepts
• C# / .NET Core
• RESTful API Design
• ASP.NET Web API
• Database Design & Normalization
• Entity Framework
• Authentication & Authorization
• SQL / Sqlite
• MVC Architecture
• LINQ
• Clean Code Principles
• JWT Authentication
• Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
• Postman
• Design Patterns
• Visual Studio / VS Code
• SOLID Principles

sections.heading: Projects
sections.content:
Clinic Appointment System
12/2025 – Present
• A web-based application that allows patients to register and book appointments
with doctors. Doctors can manage their schedules, and administrators oversee
clinic operations, including doctor availability and patient records. The system
ensures appointment conflict prevention, status tracking, and supports billing. • Tools: ASP.NET Core Web API, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Visual
Studio, JWT Authentication, RESTful API
BookCommerce
11/2025 – Present
• A full-stack e-commerce web application for buying books online. Includes
product catalog, shopping cart, order management, secure user authentication
using ASP.NET Core Identity, and implementation using N-Tier Architecture. • Tools: ASP.NET Core MVC, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Visual
Studio.
FOS Operating System
10/2024 – 01/2025
• Developed as a project for the Operating Systems course, focusing on OS
fundamentals . Implemented memory management, process scheduling, system
calls, and synchronization techniques. • Tools: C.

Abdelrahman Essam

Software Engineering Student | Full-Stack Developer (Java, Spring Boot & React)
+(20) 115 160 4204 | abdelrahmanessm508@gmail.com | Alexandria, Egypt

LinkedIn
GitHub
LeetCode
Codeforces

EDUCATION

Faculty of Engineering, Alexandria University
Aug 2022 – May 2027
B.Sc. in Computer and Systems Engineering
Alexandria, Egypt – GPA: 3.78/4.0 Top 20 students in cohort. – Relevant Coursework: Algorithms, Data Structures, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Database Systems, Software
Engineering.

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Languages: Java, C++, C, C#, Python, JavaScript
Frontend: React.js, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Spring Boot, Spring Security, REST APIs, JWT, JPA/Hibernate, Microservices
Databases: MySQL, SQL
Testing/DevOps: Git, Docker, Linux, Maven, JUnit, Mockito, JMeter
Core CS: Algorithms, Data Structures, OOP, Multithreading, OS, Networking, Software Design & Design Patterns

PROJECTS

Social Media Application | GitHub | Spring Boot, React, MySQL, JWT, WebSockets
Feb 2025 – May 2025
– Engineered 45+ RESTful APIs enabling posts, comments, friendships, and messaging workﬂows.

– Implemented secure JWT Authentication and Spring Security role-based authorization. – Built real-time messaging using WebSockets with MySQL persistence. – Performed performance testing using Apache JMeter achieving <10ms response time.

E-Commerce Platform | GitHub | Spring Boot, React, Java, MySQL, JWT, JUnit, Docker
Oct 2024 – Jan 2025
– Developed full-stack E-Commerce platform exposing 40+ REST APIs.

– Implemented JWT authentication and RBAC authorization. – Applied layered architecture with DTO/Mapper patterns for scalable backend design. – Containerized backend using Docker and validated performance with Apache JMeter.

Online Learning Platform | GitHub | Spring Boot, React, Tailwind CSS, MySQL, JWT, REST APIs
Jun 2024 – Sep 2024
– Built full-stack Learning Management System (LMS) with courses, enrollment, quizzes, and certiﬁcates.

– Implemented multi-role JWT Authentication (Student, Instructor, Admin). – Developed Instructor Dashboard and Admin Panel for course and user management. – Designed scalable REST APIs with validation, exception handling, and MySQL/JPA integration.

ACTIVITIES

ACM Algorithms Training Camp
Jun 2024 – Sep 2024
Participant
Alexandria, Egypt – Ranked Top 30 in competitive programming mock contests solving advanced graph, dynamic programming, and algorithmic
problems.

ICT and CS Assistant Teacher
Dec 2021 – Sep 2022
Teaching Assistant
Alexandria, Egypt – Mentored 50+ students in programming, algorithms, and software engineering; assisted labs, debugging, and project evaluations.

ACHIEVEMENTS

ECPC 2025 Finalist Ranked 98th nationally among competitive programming teams in Egypt.

Solved 1000+ algorithmic problems across LeetCode and Codeforces, specializing in Data Structures, Graph Algorithms, and
Dynamic Programming.

Competitive Programming Participant Alextreme and ACM training camps focusing on advanced algorithm design and optimization.

Academic Excellence: Achieved 9 A* grades in IGCSE examinations.

Feb 2025 – May 2025
– Engineered 45+ RESTful APIs enabling posts, comments, friendships, and messaging workﬂows.
– Implemented secure JWT Authentication and Spring Security role-based authorization. – Built real-time messaging using WebSockets with MySQL persistence. – Performed performance testing using Apache JMeter achieving <10ms response time.

Oct 2024 – Jan 2025

Jun 2024 – Sep 2024
– Built full-stack Learning Management System (LMS) with courses, enrollment, quizzes, and certiﬁcates.
– Implemented multi-role JWT Authentication (Student, Instructor, Admin). – Developed Instructor Dashboard and Admin Panel for course and user management. – Designed scalable REST APIs with validation, exception handling, and MySQL/JPA integration.

full_text:
Abdelrahman Amro Zakzouk
01013693331 | Abdulrahman.zakzouk@yahoo.com | linkedin.com/in/abdelrahman-zakzouk-863a44253 | github.com/abdelrahman1903

Education

German University in Cairo
Cairo, Egypt
Bachelor of Computer science and Engineering
Oct. 2021 – July 2026 • Bachelor Thesis (A+): AI-powered multimodal assistant for cultural interpretation and tourism. • Publication (AC 2025): Smart Tourism Meets AI: A Multimodal Assistant for Exploratory Cultural Engagement. Peer-reviewed
short paper accepted at the International Conference on Applied Computing, based on my A+ bachelor thesis.

Projects

Fantasy Premier League Graph-RAG Assistant | Python, Neo4j, LangChain, LLMs
3 December 2025 – 15 December 2025 • Built a Graph-RAG FPL assistant combining Neo4j knowledge graphs with LLMs for grounded player insights. • Implemented deterministic intent routing to select Cypher queries, RAG-based embedding retrieval, or clarification. • Designed reusable Cypher templates for player stats, fixtures, and season-level analysis. • Integrated RAG embedding pipelines for player similarity and recommendation using numerical and text-based features. • Evaluated multiple LLMs (Gemini, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral) across accuracy, latency, and response quality.

ZakAI: Personal AI Assistant | Python, Node.js, FastAPI, langchain, Flutter, Next.js
July 2025 – October 2025 • Built a production-style multimodal AI assistant with Python and Node.js backends and Flutter/Next.js frontends. • Implemented LLM tool-calling, structured outputs (Pydantic), dynamic routing, and robust logging for observability and debugging. • Integrated STT (Whisper), TTS (ElevenLabs), vision (Qwen3-VL-2B), and image generation (Stable Diffusion). • Designed multi-user architecture with JWT authentication, isolated sessions, and persistent chat history. • Connected external tools (Gmail OAuth2, Weather APIs) through function calling and agent-style orchestration.

AI Tourist Assistant for Cultural Interpretation — Thesis Project (Awarded an A+ Grade)
March 2025 – June 2025
Python, React, FastAPI, Google Gemini Flash 2.5 • Designed an AI-powered cultural assistant using RAG, tool calling, and structured LLM outputs. • Built a router-based backend supporting Cultural Q&A, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Tool Execution. • Implemented document ingestion and semantic search using Docling, LanceDB, and Nomic embeddings. • Added geographic reasoning for nearby place recommendations and contextual responses. • Integrated Whisper STT for real-time voice interaction.

CariGo: Trip Planner Website | React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js, Postman
October 2024 – December 2024 • Developed a MERN stack trip planner platform with JWT authentication for secure access. • Built REST APIs for itineraries, bookings, and user preferences with Node.js and Express.js. • Implemented payments system with Stripe integration, including refunds and points redemption. • Integrated a currency conversion API to display trip prices in users’ preferred currency. • Automated booking updates and offers via email notifications using Nodemailer.

Database Engine | Java, Serialization, B+ Trees
March 2024 – May 2024 • Implemented table storage using serialized files with B+ tree indices for fast retrieval. • Developed CRUD operations, schema management, and a custom query function replicating SQL SELECT for data retrieval. • Optimized memory with on-demand page loading for efficient disk usage.

Database System for Advising Students | SQL, ASP.NET,
September 2023 – January 2024 • Designed a relational database schema for an academic advising system. • Implemented stored procedures, views, and triggers for business logic and consistency. • Built an ASP.NET app supporting course scheduling, graduation planning, and payments.

Extracurricular Activities

Henkel ThinkTech Hackathon — 3rd Place | Python, Next
16 October 2025 – 18 October 2025 Selected from 250+ applicants as one of 50 participants to solve a real Henkel business challenge; our team developed and pitched a AI
tech-driven solution that secured 3rd place among 11 competing teams.

Technical Skills

Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL, C/C++ (basic), HTML, CSS
Frameworks & Libraries: LangChain, Node.js, Express.js, React, Next.js (Basic), ASP.NET (Basic)
Databases: MySQL, MongoDB (Mongoose), Neo4j
Developer Tools: Git, Postman, Kaggle
Spoken Languages: Arabic (Native), English (Fluent), German (Basic)

Python, React, FastAPI, Google Gemini Flash 2.5 • Designed an AI-powered cultural assistant using RAG, tool calling, and structured LLM outputs. • Built a router-based backend supporting Cultural Q&A, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Tool Execution. • Implemented document ingestion and semantic search using Docling, LanceDB, and Nomic embeddings. • Added geographic reasoning for nearby place recommendations and contextual responses. • Integrated Whisper STT for real-time voice interaction.
CariGo: Trip Planner Website | React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js, Postman
October 2024 – December 2024 • Developed a MERN stack trip planner platform with JWT authentication for secure access. • Built REST APIs for itineraries, bookings, and user preferences with Node.js and Express.js. • Implemented payments system with Stripe integration, including refunds and points redemption. • Integrated a currency conversion API to display trip prices in users’ preferred currency. • Automated booking updates and offers via email notifications using Nodemailer.
Database Engine | Java, Serialization, B+ Trees
March 2024 – May 2024 • Implemented table storage using serialized files with B+ tree indices for fast retrieval. • Developed CRUD operations, schema management, and a custom query function replicating SQL SELECT for data retrieval. • Optimized memory with on-demand page loading for efficient disk usage.
Database System for Advising Students | SQL, ASP.NET,
September 2023 – January 2024 • Designed a relational database schema for an academic advising system. • Implemented stored procedures, views, and triggers for business logic and consistency. • Built an ASP.NET app supporting course scheduling, graduation planning, and payments.
Extracurricular Activities
Henkel ThinkTech Hackathon — 3rd Place | Python, Next
16 October 2025 – 18 October 2025 Selected from 250+ applicants as one of 50 participants to solve a real Henkel business challenge; our team developed and pitched a AI
tech-driven solution that secured 3rd place among 11 competing teams.

Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL, C/C++ (basic), HTML, CSS

Databases: MySQL, MongoDB (Mongoose), Neo4j

short paper accepted at the International Conference on Applied Computing, based on my A+ bachelor thesis.
Projects

Fantasy Premier League Graph-RAG Assistant | Python, Neo4j, LangChain, LLMs
3 December 2025 – 15 December 2025
• Built a Graph-RAG FPL assistant combining Neo4j knowledge graphs with LLMs for grounded player insights.
• Implemented deterministic intent routing to select Cypher queries, RAG-based embedding retrieval, or clarification.
• Designed reusable Cypher templates for player stats, fixtures, and season-level analysis.
• Integrated RAG embedding pipelines for player similarity and recommendation using numerical and text-based features.
• Evaluated multiple LLMs (Gemini, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral) across accuracy, latency, and response quality.

ZakAI: Personal AI Assistant | Python, Node.js, FastAPI, langchain, Flutter, Next.js
July 2025 – October 2025
• Built a production-style multimodal AI assistant with Python and Node.js backends and Flutter/Next.js frontends.
• Implemented LLM tool-calling, structured outputs (Pydantic), dynamic routing, and robust logging for observability and debugging.
• Integrated STT (Whisper), TTS (ElevenLabs), vision (Qwen3-VL-2B), and image generation (Stable Diffusion).
• Designed multi-user architecture with JWT authentication, isolated sessions, and persistent chat history.
• Connected external tools (Gmail OAuth2, Weather APIs) through function calling and agent-style orchestration.

sections.heading: General
sections.content:
Abdelrahman Amro Zakzouk
01013693331 | Abdulrahman.zakzouk@yahoo.com | linkedin.com/in/abdelrahman-zakzouk-863a44253 | github.com/abdelrahman1903

sections.heading: Education
sections.content:
German University in Cairo
Cairo, Egypt
Bachelor of Computer science and Engineering
Oct. 2021 – July 2026 • Bachelor Thesis (A+): AI-powered multimodal assistant for cultural interpretation and tourism. • Publication (AC 2025): Smart Tourism Meets AI: A Multimodal Assistant for Exploratory Cultural Engagement. Peer-reviewed
short paper accepted at the International Conference on Applied Computing, based on my A+ bachelor thesis.

sections.heading: Projects
sections.content:
Fantasy Premier League Graph-RAG Assistant | Python, Neo4j, LangChain, LLMs
3 December 2025 – 15 December 2025 • Built a Graph-RAG FPL assistant combining Neo4j knowledge graphs with LLMs for grounded player insights. • Implemented deterministic intent routing to select Cypher queries, RAG-based embedding retrieval, or clarification. • Designed reusable Cypher templates for player stats, fixtures, and season-level analysis. • Integrated RAG embedding pipelines for player similarity and recommendation using numerical and text-based features. • Evaluated multiple LLMs (Gemini, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral) across accuracy, latency, and response quality.
ZakAI: Personal AI Assistant | Python, Node.js, FastAPI, langchain, Flutter, Next.js
July 2025 – October 2025 • Built a production-style multimodal AI assistant with Python and Node.js backends and Flutter/Next.js frontends. • Implemented LLM tool-calling, structured outputs (Pydantic), dynamic routing, and robust logging for observability and debugging. • Integrated STT (Whisper), TTS (ElevenLabs), vision (Qwen3-VL-2B), and image generation (Stable Diffusion). • Designed multi-user architecture with JWT authentication, isolated sessions, and persistent chat history. • Connected external tools (Gmail OAuth2, Weather APIs) through function calling and agent-style orchestration.
AI Tourist Assistant for Cultural Interpretation — Thesis Project (Awarded an A+ Grade)
March 2025 – June 2025
Python, React, FastAPI, Google Gemini Flash 2.5 • Designed an AI-powered cultural assistant using RAG, tool calling, and structured LLM outputs. • Built a router-based backend supporting Cultural Q&A, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Tool Execution. • Implemented document ingestion and semantic search using Docling, LanceDB, and Nomic embeddings. • Added geographic reasoning for nearby place recommendations and contextual responses. • Integrated Whisper STT for real-time voice interaction.
CariGo: Trip Planner Website | React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js, Postman
October 2024 – December 2024 • Developed a MERN stack trip planner platform with JWT authentication for secure access. • Built REST APIs for itineraries, bookings, and user preferences with Node.js and Express.js. • Implemented payments system with Stripe integration, including refunds and points redemption. • Integrated a currency conversion API to display trip prices in users’ preferred currency. • Automated booking updates and offers via email notifications using Nodemailer.
Database Engine | Java, Serialization, B+ Trees
March 2024 – May 2024 • Implemented table storage using serialized files with B+ tree indices for fast retrieval. • Developed CRUD operations, schema management, and a custom query function replicating SQL SELECT for data retrieval. • Optimized memory with on-demand page loading for efficient disk usage.
Database System for Advising Students | SQL, ASP.NET,
September 2023 – January 2024 • Designed a relational database schema for an academic advising system. • Implemented stored procedures, views, and triggers for business logic and consistency. • Built an ASP.NET app supporting course scheduling, graduation planning, and payments.

Administration (Kali/Ubuntu), Penetration Testing.

TECHNICAL SKILLS & LANGUAGES

• Software & Tools: Odoo, Linux (Kali), Meta Ads Manager, Crypto Wallets, Shopify, n8n, Power BI.

• Personal Traits: Avid Reader, Strategic Thinker, Global Success Tracker. • Languages: Arabic (Native), English (Excellent Reading/Listening | Intermediate Speaking).

full_text:
Adel Hesham Elnimr
IT Engineer

R adelelnimr32@gmail.com | ¯ linkedin.com/in/adel-elnimr |  github.com/adel-hesham

Ó +20 103 476 3706 |  Cairo, Egypt | Military Service Status: Postponed

SUMMARY

Electronics & Communications Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in Linux, networking, and cloud technologies (AWS).
Skilled in system administration, version control (Git/GitHub), and IT workflow automation. Experienced with monitoring tools
(Prometheus, Grafana) and supporting IT infrastructure. Passionate about learning, troubleshooting, and optimizing systems to improve
performance and reliability in professional IT environments.

EDUCATION

Higher Technological Institute
Alsharqia, Egypt
Bachelor of Engineering, Communications & Electronics Department
Oct. 2020 – Jan. 2026

• GPA 2.75 / 4.0 (Good).
• Graduation Project Grade (A+)
EXPERIENCE Digital Egypt Pioneers Initiative (DEPI)
Jun. 2025 – Dec. 2025
DevOps Track Trainee - Ministry of Communications and Information Technology
Online

• Gained hands-on experience in Linux, Bash scripting, Git, and Python while automating cloud infrastructure with Docker,
Kubernetes, Helm, AWS, Terraform, and Ansible.
• Developed full-stack observability solutions with Prometheus and Grafana to ensure 99.9% system reliability through real-time
performance visualization.
• Learned to optimize CI/CD workflows by integrating Jenkins with source control for automated builds and seamless deployments
to EKS.
PROJECTS Graduation Project: Cloud-Native Node.js App with IaC & CI/CD and Observability ®
Jun. 2026 • Built scalable AWS EKS infrastructure using Terraform modules for reusable environment provisioning.
• Designed GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline with AWS authentication and Git SHA-based image tagging for traceable deployments.
• Implemented HPA and Cluster Autoscaler to optimize resource usage under traffic fluctuations.
• Set up Prometheus & Grafana for centralized monitoring and real-time application observability.
Cloud-Native EKS Infrastructure & CI/CD Pipeline ®
Dec. 2025 • Provisioned AWS EKS cluster with private Nexus registry using Terraform and Ansible for high availability and secure image
management.
• Built a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline with automated EKS deployments, HPA, and Cluster Autoscaler to optimize resource usage and
eliminate manual steps.
PC Controller ® | C++
Mar. 2025 • Developed a remote control server utilizing TCP socket programming on Linux to execute administrative commands.
Python Alexa Simulation ® | Python
Aug. 2024

• Developed a voice assistant featuring speech recognition, automated application control, and web search integration.
TECHNICAL SKILLS • Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, Terraform (IaC), Ansible (Configuration Management)
• Containers & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm
• CI/CD & Automation: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Git, CI/CD Pipelines
• Observability & Monitoring: Prometheus and Grafana
• Languages & Scripting: Python, Bash Scripting, Linux Command Line, C/C++
• Networking: Computer networking fundamentals, TCP/IP, UDP, DNS, SSH, Socket Programming, Wireshark
• Databases: PostgreSql
SOFT SKILLS • Problem Solving & Critical Thinking

• Ownership & Accountability
• Team Collaboration & Communication
• Adaptability & Fast Learning
• Time Management & Prioritization
• Attention to Detail
COURSES • Embedded Linux by pn-junction
• Embedded Systems by IMT
LANGUAGES • Arabic (Native)
• English (Professional working proficiency)

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Electronics & Communications Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in Linux, networking, and cloud technologies (AWS).
Skilled in system administration, version control (Git/GitHub), and IT workflow automation. Experienced with monitoring tools
(Prometheus, Grafana) and supporting IT infrastructure. Passionate about learning, troubleshooting, and optimizing systems to improve
performance and reliability in professional IT environments.

sections.heading: Education
sections.content:
Higher Technological Institute
Alsharqia, Egypt
Bachelor of Engineering, Communications & Electronics Department
Oct. 2020 – Jan. 2026
• GPA 2.75 / 4.0 (Good).
• Graduation Project Grade (A+)
EXPERIENCE Digital Egypt Pioneers Initiative (DEPI)
Jun. 2025 – Dec. 2025
DevOps Track Trainee - Ministry of Communications and Information Technology
Online
• Gained hands-on experience in Linux, Bash scripting, Git, and Python while automating cloud infrastructure with Docker,
Kubernetes, Helm, AWS, Terraform, and Ansible.
• Developed full-stack observability solutions with Prometheus and Grafana to ensure 99.9% system reliability through real-time
performance visualization.
• Learned to optimize CI/CD workflows by integrating Jenkins with source control for automated builds and seamless deployments
to EKS.
PROJECTS Graduation Project: Cloud-Native Node.js App with IaC & CI/CD and Observability ®
Jun. 2026 • Built scalable AWS EKS infrastructure using Terraform modules for reusable environment provisioning.
• Designed GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline with AWS authentication and Git SHA-based image tagging for traceable deployments.
• Implemented HPA and Cluster Autoscaler to optimize resource usage under traffic fluctuations.
• Set up Prometheus & Grafana for centralized monitoring and real-time application observability.
Cloud-Native EKS Infrastructure & CI/CD Pipeline ®
Dec. 2025 • Provisioned AWS EKS cluster with private Nexus registry using Terraform and Ansible for high availability and secure image
management.
• Built a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline with automated EKS deployments, HPA, and Cluster Autoscaler to optimize resource usage and
eliminate manual steps.
PC Controller ® | C++
Mar. 2025 • Developed a remote control server utilizing TCP socket programming on Linux to execute administrative commands.
Python Alexa Simulation ® | Python
Aug. 2024
• Developed a voice assistant featuring speech recognition, automated application control, and web search integration.
TECHNICAL SKILLS • Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, Terraform (IaC), Ansible (Configuration Management)
• Containers & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm
• CI/CD & Automation: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Git, CI/CD Pipelines
• Observability & Monitoring: Prometheus and Grafana
• Languages & Scripting: Python, Bash Scripting, Linux Command Line, C/C++
• Networking: Computer networking fundamentals, TCP/IP, UDP, DNS, SSH, Socket Programming, Wireshark
• Databases: PostgreSql
SOFT SKILLS • Problem Solving & Critical Thinking
• Ownership & Accountability
• Team Collaboration & Communication
• Adaptability & Fast Learning
• Time Management & Prioritization
• Attention to Detail
COURSES • Embedded Linux by pn-junction
• Embedded Systems by IMT
LANGUAGES • Arabic (Native)
• English (Professional working proficiency)

pages.text:
CERTIFICATES
Cisco Networking Academy® Get Connected course Identify different types of computer systems, internal components and external devices.
Understand the structure of the directories in Microsoft Windows, and how to work with files
and folders using a text editor.
Identify common problems and implement simple solutions for hardware, software and
networks
AITB Python Certificate (20 training hours) Completed Introduction to Python training
National Telecommunication Institute (NTI) Python for Data Analysis (75 training hours) Assisted in maintaining databases, ensuring accuracy and consistency of information across
systems.
Automated data processing tasks, improving efficiency and reducing manual errors in reporting.
Shift Up Program – Artificial Intelligence (RiskRice) Developed AI models to enhance data processing efficiency and accuracy.
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
Technical Skills: Project Management, Problem Solving, Programming,
Languages: Arabic, English, German, Italian
Awards/Activities: Third place in IPM Math Egyptian competition for mental math
Awarded the ideal student in 2018,2019 (preparatory stage)
Awarded the ideal student in 2020,2021,2022 (secondary stage)

full_text:
Ahmed Abdelaziz Elshahawy | Backend Developer | .NET Developer

Egypt, Cairo | 01555048280 | AhmedSahahawy59@gmail.com | www.linkedin.com/in/ahmed-
shahawy-2980301a6 | Leet Code :- https://leetcode.com/u/leeter5/ | GitHub :-
https://github.com/AhmedSheeha | Military Service : Exempted

Summary

Junior Backend Developer | .NET Specialist | Problem Solver Enthusiastic and detail-oriented, with expertise in .NET, OOP, and design patterns. Skilled in
problem-solving and creating scalable solutions, I’m a quick-learning, self-motivated team
player committed to growth in software development.

Skills

Programming Languages:- C++, JavaScript, and C#.

Backend Technologies :- LINQ, Entity Framework, Restfull API, .NET Core, MVC, Identity, Jwt,
and SignalR. Databases:- MS SQL server.

Frontend Technologies:- HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap.

Software Skills:- Object Oriented Programming, Algorithms, Data Structures, Design Patterns,
SOLID, Problem Solving, and Clean Code.

Tools :- Git & GitHub.

Soft Skills:- Communication, Teamwork and Collaboration, Critical Thinking and Interpersonal Intelligence.

Projects

Store API(GitHub:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/Store):-

•
Ecommerce API Enables Customers To make orders And even to Adjust it Later.
•
Allows the Admin to Add, remove, and Update the products under different Categories.
As there is Authorization layer to restrict normal users.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core API– SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ – JWT - Microsoft
Identity .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection – DTOs – CQRS – Clean Architecture - Mediator.

Clinic Management system API(Github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/clinic):-

•
A system To manage A clink Efficiently, allows user or patient to have an account and to
have his/her history with The Clinic.

•
allows the patient to view the Schedule for Each Doctor at the Clinic, and gives him the
Ability to create an appointment at any specific time the doctors are available.
•
allows doctor to create their schedule and when they are Available so the patients can
know.
•
Doctors can close the appointment and make Attendance then write the diagnosis in
the Patient History.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core API– SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ – JWT - Microsoft
Identity .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection – DTOs.

School Management API(github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/School)

• School Application To Manage All the Affairs Related to the School Students , the Teachers, and the Departments.

Library Management System(Github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/Library-
System):-

•
Perfectly Manages The Library to add, delete, update and Borrow the borrow the books.
•
allows administrators to manage books in the Library.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core MVC – SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection.
•
Used the Model Views to Transfer the Data between the Controllers and the Views.

ERP System (MVC)(Github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/ERP):-

•
A system For a Store to manage their Products (Add, Delete, Update)and and Also to
mange their Employes .
•
Authorization For every action related to the products Information and Employee
Information so only Admin Who Can Change The data.
•
Also Customers Can View The products.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core MVC – SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ – JWT, Identity .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection - DTO.
•
Security:- Maintained Via Authorization and Authentication.

Languages

•
Arabic:- Native.
•
English :- Fluent Speaker – C1.

•
allows the patient to view the Schedule for Each Doctor at the Clinic, and gives him the
Ability to create an appointment at any specific time the doctors are available.
•
allows doctor to create their schedule and when they are Available so the patients can
know.
•
Doctors can close the appointment and make Attendance then write the diagnosis in
the Patient History.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core API– SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ – JWT - Microsoft
Identity .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection – DTOs.
School Management API(github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/School)
• School Application To Manage All the Affairs Related to the School Students , the Teachers, and the Departments.
Library Management System(Github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/Library-
System):-
•
Perfectly Manages The Library to add, delete, update and Borrow the borrow the books.
•
allows administrators to manage books in the Library.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core MVC – SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection.
•
Used the Model Views to Transfer the Data between the Controllers and the Views.
ERP System (MVC)(Github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/ERP):-
•
A system For a Store to manage their Products (Add, Delete, Update)and and Also to
mange their Employes .
•
Authorization For every action related to the products Information and Employee
Information so only Admin Who Can Change The data.
•
Also Customers Can View The products.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core MVC – SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ – JWT, Identity .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection - DTO.
•
Security:- Maintained Via Authorization and Authentication.

full_text:
Ahmed Elsayed
[Cairo, Egypt][+20 106-204-2584][a_elsayed_f@icloud.com][GitHub][LinkedIn]

Professional Summary
Backend Developer specialized in .NET, experienced in building scalable APIs and backend
systems using C#, ASP.NET Core, EF Core, and SQL Server. Strong problem-solver with clean
coding practices and a focus on performance, reliability, and delivering high-quality solutions.

Skills

.NET, ASP.NET Core, EF Core, C#, SQL Server, REST API development, LINQ, Clean Architecture.

Strong in OOP, Data Structures & Algorithms, Problem Solving, Agile.

Proficient with Git, Postman, and basic web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).

Professional Experience

Backend Developer – Off-shoreUp Remote Contract (USA) 3-month contract​
Developed a landing website and CRM system in a fully remote setup.

Backend Developer – Self-Employed

●​ Built and launched an e-commerce platform (“Commerca”) using .NET, including product management, orders, payments, and admin dashboard.​
●​ Customized and deployed the system for multiple clients, handling full development, delivery, and maintenance.

Educations & Certificates
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science from Faculty of Computer Science
Misr International University — 2020 - 2024 GPA: 3.1
Backend Web Development (.NET)
Route Learning 2024-2025
Completed a comprehensive backend development program covering C#, ASP.NET Core, EF
Core, SQL Server, and API development.

Extracurricular Activities

IT Member – MUN & Arab League (2022–2023): Built internal portals for attendance,
complaints, and HR interviews using PHP, HTML, CSS, JS, AJAX.

Project Manager – MUN & Arab League (2023–Present): Leading project planning and
team coordination.

Ahmed Khaled Mohammad | Maadi Grand City Compound, Maadi, Cairo – Egypt

+201033716962 | AhmedKhaled6444@gmail.com | LinkedIn - Portfolio

OBJECTIVE

•
To secure a challenging position in a reputable organization to expand my learnings, knowledge, and skills.
Secure a responsible career opportunity to fully utilize my training and skills, while making a significant
contribution to the success of the company.

WORKING EXPERIENCE

2024-PRESENT
2025-2026

Fab.com | Cairo Egypt (Remote)

•
Graphic Designer (Freelancer)

ADEEF – France | Cairo Egypt (Remote)

•
Software Engineer (Freelancer)

EDUCATION

2020-2025

Bachelor of Engineering - Computer Science Major Egyptian Chinese University - Cairo, Egypt •
Graduate Student - Software Engineer [Grade: Very Good]

COMPUTER SKILLS

Languages

•
Proficient with React, React Native, Java, Typescript •
Good with c++, c#, python, sql •
Familiar with node js

Software

•
Visual Studio Code •
Android Studio •
Database: SQL server and MySQL server •
Platforms: windows, Linux •
Frameworks: React Js, Node Js

Technologies

•
Web: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux / Zustand, HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Styled-Components, Webpack •
Mobile: React Native, Expo, React Navigation, native modules •
Backend & APIs: Node.js, JWT, WebSockets •
Databases: MySQL, SQLite •
Tools & Practices: Git, GitHub/GitLab, Agile/Scrum, Jira, Figma (basic)

•

PROJECTS

2025

•
Creating a full flutter application, an EV charging station finder that utilized
Google Maps API, and Firebase Authentication for my Graduation Project
https://github.com/Medo6444/ev-charging-station-finder •
Creating and deploying an android app, an offline Habit Tracker using centered
around privacy, using SQLite, and React Native Expo on Google Play

2025-2026

•
Creating and deploying a complete WebPortal, utilizing JWT Tokens,
GoCardles API, DocuSign API, and MySQL for the French company
ADEEF Co.
ADEEF.org

2025-2026

LANGUAGES

•
Arabic Native Language •
English Speak fluently, read and write with high proficiency

•
Japanese beginner in reading and writing

REFERENCES

•
References upon request.

full_text:
AHMED SALAH MANSOUR

Cairo, Egypt | 01111924496 | ahmedsalah66848@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub

SUMMARY

Motivated Computer Science graduate specializing in Backend & AI Engineering with expertise in
scalable backend systems using Laravel, Spring Boot, and microservices. Skilled in database
optimization, AI/ML model deployment, and Docker-based environments. Strong knowledge in deep
learning, computer vision, and NLP architectures.

EDUCATION

BSc in Computer Science — Ain Shams University (09/2020 – 06/2025), Cairo, Egypt
Specialization: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
Graduation Project: Molecular Generation & Optimization using REINVENT + Quantum Computing
(A+)

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Backend Technologies: Laravel, Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, Microservices, Docker, Message Queue
(Redis, RabbitMQ).
Databases: MySQL (Schema Design & Optimization).
AI & Machine Learning: Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Keras, MLflow, DVC.
Deep Learning / CV / NLP: CNN, RNN, Transformers, YOLO, Mask R-CNN, ViT, DETR.
Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
Version Control: Git, GitHub.
CI/CD & Deployment: Docker Compose.
Authentication & Security: JWT, OAuth2, API security (rate limiting, validation, encryption).
Caching & Optimization: Redis caching, API performance tuning, query optimization.
Testing: Unit Testing (PHPUnit / JUnit).
Problem Solving: Strong DSA understanding (advanced) • Specialist Problem Solver with 300+ solved
on Codeforces.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Dayra — Backend Intern (Jul 2022 – Oct 2022) — Hybrid
Worked on production-grade financial microservices including interest accrual calculations, invoicing
pipelines, and Egyptian Tax Authority integration. Implemented secure RESTful APIs with validation
layers, encryption, rate limiting, and structured error handling. Developed idempotent transaction
workflows using UUID keys, race-condition protections, and composite constraints to prevent
duplication. Built automated cron financial pipelines, retry mechanisms, circuit-breaker patterns,
dead-letter queue handling, and monitoring dashboards ensuring fault-tolerant backend performance.

PROJECTS

Molecular Generation & Optimization using REINVENT + Quantum Computing:
Developed an end-to-end molecular generation pipeline using a customized REINVENT model with
domain-specific scoring functions. Integrated quantum evaluation modules and delivered a complete
training, validation, and analysis workflow.

Customer Billing & Loan Service — Dayra:
Developed backend logic for billing and loan operations, designed optimized schemas, secured APIs,
and migrated processes into background pipelines using queues and scheduled jobs.

COURSES & ACHIEVEMENTS | • Internship Certification — Dayra (Backend Engineering)
• Backend Certification — Cybers (PHP, Laravel)
• Codeforces Specialist — Competitive Programming
• Certified Full Stack Developer (PHP, Laravel, MySQL)
• HackerRank: Software Engineer Intern, SQL, Python, Java

LANGUAGES

Arabic — Native
English — Fluent

SOFT SKILLS | Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset, effective communication, teamwork (Agile/Scrum),
adaptability.

Akram Tarek El Raey

Phone: +20 (102) 697-1925| Email: akramelraey@gmail.com |Cairo, Kobry El Qobba

Education

Misr International University (MIU), Cairo

•
Bachelor of Business Administration (Major: Business Intelligence), Expected to Graduate in 2027

Experience

Career 180 – Event Coordinator (August 2025 – December 2025) • Screened, shortlisted, and interviewed event organizer candidates through in-person and phone
interviews. • Coordinated training sessions and site visits for IRC and IAP 2025, ensuring team readiness and
compliance with event standards. • Supported organizer evaluation and performance monitoring. • Planned and executed major events including Intellect Conference 2025, Banking & Fintech Summit
2025, Her Mark Expo, and CFYE. • Managed operations for Nahdit Misr events, overseeing organizer coordination and on-ground logistics. New Game – Logistics Intern (January 2025 – April 2025) •
Added products to Amazon and Noon platforms.
•
Trained as a game master, guiding customers during event gameplay.

Mersal Foundation – PR and Marketing Intern (August 2021 – September 2021) •
Created and optimized Facebook Ads to enhance outreach.
•
Uploaded and updated new products on the organization’s website.

Extracurricular Activities

Cairo International Book Fair 55 – Volunteer (January – February 2024)

full_text:
Almohanad Ahmed Shaaban

• +201062717061 • 6th of October, Giza, EG • almohanad.ahmed2026@gmail.com

• LinkedIn: Al-Mohanad Ahmed • GitHub: mohanad20-s

Flutter Developer

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Experienced Flutter Developer with a solid foundation in Dart and cross-platform mobile
development. Proven expertise in building high-performance, scalable applications using
Clean Architecture and SOLID principles. A proactive problem-solver with extensive
hands-on experience gained from ITI and DEPI intensive training, specializing in
responsive UI/UX, state management, and seamless API integration.

TECHNICAL EXPERIENCE & TRAINING

Flutter Development Intern | ITI (Information Technology Institute) Winter Training
| Jan 2026 – Feb 2026 •
Performance Optimization: Developed complex UIs with custom animations,
ensuring a consistent 60 FPS rendering speed and smooth user transitions.
•
Data Architecture: Integrated Hive and SQLite for local persistence, resulting in
a 40% increase in data retrieval speed and enabling robust offline functionality.
•
State Management & Lifecycle: Managed complex application states using
Bloc and Provider, reducing memory leaks by 15% through precise widget
lifecycle management.
•
Modular Programming: Applied OOD patterns (Singleton, Command) to build
reusable components, decreasing code redundancy by 25% across multiple
training projects.

Mobile Application Development (Flutter) Intern | DEPI | May 2024 – Nov 2024 •
Production-Ready Engineering: Engineered scalable Flutter applications,
optimizing widget trees to reduce initial app load time by 20%.
•
Backend Efficiency: Optimized data flow using Dio and RESTful APIs,
implementing advanced JSON parsing that reduced API response handling time
by 15%.
•
Scalable Authentication: Integrated secure Firebase Authentication and
Firestore, supporting real-time data sync for concurrent users with minimal
latency.

•
Agile Collaboration: Managed codebases via Git/GitHub in a team
environment, achieving 100% conflict-free integration through strategic branch
management.

TECHNICAL PROJECTS

Food Delivery Application | View on GitHub •
Engineered a full-featured cross-platform app emphasizing Responsive Design to
ensure UI consistency across various screen sizes. •
Implemented real-time UI updates and a customized Favorites system to
enhance user personalization and engagement. •
Utilized Clean Architecture to ensure strict separation of concerns and high code
maintainability.

News & Weather Integration App (ITI Practice) •
Optimized data fetching by consuming RESTful APIs using the Dio package for
real-time updates. •
Applied analytical thinking to streamline user experience by handling complex
JSON parsing and robust error handling.

TECHNICAL SKILLS

•
Languages & Frameworks: Flutter, Dart. •
Software Design: SOLID Principles, Clean Architecture, Design Patterns. •
State Management: Provider, Bloc/Cubit, Stateful Widget Lifecycle. •
Database & Backend: Firebase, REST APIs, Hive, SQLite, JSON Serialization. •
Tools: Git, GitHub, Android Studio, VS Code, Postman.

EDUCATION

Bachelor of Computer Science | Thebes Academy, Egypt Expected Graduation: June 2026

CORE COMPETENCIES

•
Technical Problem Solving: Strong debugging and troubleshooting capabilities in
complex Flutter environments. •
Collaborative Development: Experienced in working within technical teams and
maintaining clear project documentation. •
Continuous Learning: Rapidly adapting to new frameworks and evolving industry
best practices to deliver modern mobile solutions.

development. Proven expertise in building high-performance, scalable applications using

semantic_blocks.label: paragraph

semantic_blocks.text:
Flutter Development Intern | ITI (Information Technology Institute) Winter Training
| Jan 2026 – Feb 2026 •
Performance Optimization: Developed complex UIs with custom animations,
ensuring a consistent 60 FPS rendering speed and smooth user transitions.
•
Data Architecture: Integrated Hive and SQLite for local persistence, resulting in
a 40% increase in data retrieval speed and enabling robust offline functionality.
•
State Management & Lifecycle: Managed complex application states using
Bloc and Provider, reducing memory leaks by 15% through precise widget
lifecycle management.
•
Modular Programming: Applied OOD patterns (Singleton, Command) to build
reusable components, decreasing code redundancy by 25% across multiple
training projects.

full_text:
Bashar Abdel-Sattar El-Samahy

Systems Admin/DevOps

basharelsamahy7@gmail.com
+201093267362
El Husseiniya, Al-Sharqia
Bashar El-Samahy Bashar-samahy
Bashar Abdel-Sattar El-Samahy

Profile

Systems Admin/DevOps proficient in managing Windows/Linux servers, cloud infrastructure, and automation solutions. Skilled in
cloud platforms, containerization, and CI/CD tools, with a strong focus on optimizing workflows, enhancing system reliability, and
enabling smooth deployments. A collaborative team player committed to contributing to scalable and efficient IT environments.

Experience & Internships | DevOps Instructor – (part-time)
09/2025 – Present | Dokki - Giza
Instant
A DevOps Instructor teaches students the core DevOps tools and practices, delivers hands-on labs, and guides learners in building
skills in automation, cloud, CI/CD, Linux, and containerization to prepare them for real industry workflows.

Technical Support Specialist – (full-time)
12/2024 – 2/2025 | Nasr City - Cairo
Telecom Egypt Company
responsible for diagnosing and troubleshooting software, hardware, and network issues to ensure smooth operation of telecom
services.
provide technical assistance to customers, configure systems, manage network setups, and follow up to resolve problems
efficiently, ensuring high customer satisfaction and service reliability.

Education

Systems Administration/DevOps Trainee 03/2025 – 07/2025
Information Technology Institute – ITI (Intensive Code Camps) Damanhur City, Al Beheira Governorate
Bachelor of Computers and Informatics.
09/2019 – 07/2023
Faculty of Computers and Informatics, Zagazig University
Zagazig City, Ash Sharqiyah Governorate
Grade: Good

Projects

Comprehensive User & Service Management on Windows Server
• Designed and deployed a multi-domain Windows Server infrastructure with Active Directory, DNS, FTP, and automated software deployment, ensuring high availability and centralized management. Implemented group policies, backup solutions, and security
measures to optimize performance and safeguard network resources.

Comprehensive Enterprise Linux Deployment Project
• Designed and deployed a full enterprise Linux environment for a mid-sized company using Red Hat. Implemented secure user/group management, LVM-based storage, access controls, SELinux, and automated backups. Configured internal web services, firewall
rules, SSH hardening, and recovery procedures as part of system administration tasks.

User Management System – Bash script
(GitHub)
• This Bash script provides a simple, menu-driven interface for Linux system administrators to manage user accounts and groups efficiently. It allows adding, deleting, listing, and searching for users, changing passwords, and creating backups of user data.
Secure Web App on AWS (Terraform)
(GitHub)
• Designed and deployed a public proxy/private backend architecture on AWS using Terraform, enforcing security best practices.

Implemented multi-AZ VPC, ALB, Auto Scaling, and isolated RDS with fine-grained access controls. Achieved infrastructure-as-
code reproducibility with modular Terraform and remote state management.
• Key Stack: AWS (EC2, VPC, ALB, RDS, S3) | Terraform | Linux | SSH

Certificates

RHCSA - Red Hat Certified System Administrator
HCCDA-Tech Essentials (HWENDCTEDA897617)
AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
HCCDP-Cloud Migration (HWENDCCCDP778800)

Technical Skills

Cloud Platforms
CI/CD Tools
AWS and Huawei Cloud
Jenkins and GitHub Actions
Containerization & Orchestration
Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift and Helm
Terraform and Ansible
Scripting & Programming
Version Control
Python, Bash, Data Structures and Algorithms
Git and GitHub.
Monitoring
Operating Systems
Prometheus, Grafana
Linux (Ubuntu, RedHat), Windows Server and VMware vSphere
Databases
Formatting
MySQL, PostgreSQL and MongoDB
YAML and JSON
Others
NGINX, Apache.

Languages

Arabic — Native/Bilingual
English — Proficient

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Systems Admin/DevOps proficient in managing Windows/Linux servers, cloud infrastructure, and automation solutions. Skilled in
cloud platforms, containerization, and CI/CD tools, with a strong focus on optimizing workflows, enhancing system reliability, and
enabling smooth deployments. A collaborative team player committed to contributing to scalable and efficient IT environments.

sections.heading: Experience
sections.content:
& Internships | DevOps Instructor – (part-time)
09/2025 – Present | Dokki - Giza
Instant
A DevOps Instructor teaches students the core DevOps tools and practices, delivers hands-on labs, and guides learners in building
skills in automation, cloud, CI/CD, Linux, and containerization to prepare them for real industry workflows.
Technical Support Specialist – (full-time)
12/2024 – 2/2025 | Nasr City - Cairo
Telecom Egypt Company
responsible for diagnosing and troubleshooting software, hardware, and network issues to ensure smooth operation of telecom
services.
provide technical assistance to customers, configure systems, manage network setups, and follow up to resolve problems
efficiently, ensuring high customer satisfaction and service reliability.

sections.heading: Education
sections.content:
Systems Administration/DevOps Trainee 03/2025 – 07/2025
Information Technology Institute – ITI (Intensive Code Camps) Damanhur City, Al Beheira Governorate
Bachelor of Computers and Informatics.
09/2019 – 07/2023
Faculty of Computers and Informatics, Zagazig University
Zagazig City, Ash Sharqiyah Governorate
Grade: Good

sections.heading: Projects
sections.content:
Comprehensive User & Service Management on Windows Server
• Designed and deployed a multi-domain Windows Server infrastructure with Active Directory, DNS, FTP, and automated software deployment, ensuring high availability and centralized management. Implemented group policies, backup solutions, and security
measures to optimize performance and safeguard network resources.
Comprehensive Enterprise Linux Deployment Project
• Designed and deployed a full enterprise Linux environment for a mid-sized company using Red Hat. Implemented secure user/group management, LVM-based storage, access controls, SELinux, and automated backups. Configured internal web services, firewall
rules, SSH hardening, and recovery procedures as part of system administration tasks.
User Management System – Bash script
(GitHub)
• This Bash script provides a simple, menu-driven interface for Linux system administrators to manage user accounts and groups efficiently. It allows adding, deleting, listing, and searching for users, changing passwords, and creating backups of user data.
Secure Web App on AWS (Terraform)
(GitHub)
• Designed and deployed a public proxy/private backend architecture on AWS using Terraform, enforcing security best practices.
Implemented multi-AZ VPC, ALB, Auto Scaling, and isolated RDS with fine-grained access controls. Achieved infrastructure-as-
code reproducibility with modular Terraform and remote state management.
• Key Stack: AWS (EC2, VPC, ALB, RDS, S3) | Terraform | Linux | SSH

Comprehensive User & Service Management on Windows Server

measures to optimize performance and safeguard network resources.
semantic_blocks.original_text:
Comprehensive User & Service Management on Windows Server 
• Designed and deployed a multi-domain Windows Server infrastructure with Active Directory, DNS, FTP, and automated software 
deployment, ensuring high availability and centralized management. Implemented group policies, backup solutions, and security 
measures to optimize performance and safeguard network resources.
semantic_blocks.label: paragraph

semantic_blocks.text:
Comprehensive Enterprise Linux Deployment Project
• Designed and deployed a full enterprise Linux environment for a mid-sized company using Red Hat. Implemented secure user/group management, LVM-based storage, access controls, SELinux, and automated backups. Configured internal web services, firewall
rules, SSH hardening, and recovery procedures as part of system administration tasks.
semantic_blocks.original_text:
Comprehensive Enterprise Linux Deployment Project 
• Designed and deployed a full enterprise Linux environment for a mid-sized company using Red Hat. Implemented secure user/group 
management, LVM-based storage, access controls, SELinux, and automated backups. Configured internal web services, firewall 
rules, SSH hardening, and recovery procedures as part of system administration tasks.

semantic_blocks.text:
User Management System – Bash script
(GitHub)
• This Bash script provides a simple, menu-driven interface for Linux system administrators to manage user accounts and groups efficiently. It allows adding, deleting, listing, and searching for users, changing passwords, and creating backups of user data.
Secure Web App on AWS (Terraform)
(GitHub)
• Designed and deployed a public proxy/private backend architecture on AWS using Terraform, enforcing security best practices.

BASMALA ABDELHAMED

Giza, Egypt · 01030152439
Basmalaayman201@gmail.com · linkedln·

A motivated and detail-oriented individual with a strong foundation in Python, JavaScript, and data
analysis. My technical expertise, combined with problem-solving and critical-thinking skills, enables me to
analyze complex datasets and provide actionable insights to drive business optimization. With a passion
for leveraging technology to enhance decision-making, I aim to contribute to innovative and dynamic
environments.

EXPERIENCE

AUGUST 2025
IT INTERN, ORA DEVELOPER •
Supported IT infrastructure management to maintain seamless daily operations.
•
Addressed user issues through technical support within ticketing frameworks.
•
Facilitated troubleshooting of connectivity issues related to networking activities.
•
Contributed to cybersecurity efforts by monitoring and reporting security
AUGUST 2024
INTERN, COMMERCIAL INTERNATIONAL BANK (CIB) •
Completed a remote internship with exposure to corporate banking and supporting the
credit and risk management teams.
•
Assisted in preparing financial reports, reviewing loan applications, and performing
financial statement audits.
JULY 2024
BPO INTERN, NATIONAL BANK OF EGYPT (NBE) •
was selected among Top Performance interns during 2024 out of 1000 interns for
exceptional contributions to the BPO (Business Process optimization) department.
•
Participated in workshops on financial analysis, risk management

efficiently.
•
Manage customer accounts, ensure accurate billing, and assist other departments in
handling complex customer cases.
•
Stay up-to-date with Vodafone products and services to deliver exceptional service and
resolve complaints.

EDUCATION

BUSINESS INFORMATION SYSTEM (BIS), HELWAN UNIVERSITY

•

Tableau

Problem-solving and critical thinking

Communication and presentation skills

Team collaboration and leadership

VOLUNTEERING

MAY 2022 ,FAZZA INTERNATIONAL BADMINTON CHAMPIONSHIP
- ⁠Collaborated with the media team and Dubai TV channel for event coverage.
FEBRUARY 2022 ,DUBAI 2022 WORLD ARCHERY PARA CHAMPIONSHIPS
- Responsible for data entry and providing access to individuals on the technical committee.

countries

- ⁠Permitted entry for fans and validated tickets.

sections.heading: General
sections.content:
BASMALA ABDELHAMED
Giza, Egypt · 01030152439
Basmalaayman201@gmail.com · linkedln·
A motivated and detail-oriented individual with a strong foundation in Python, JavaScript, and data
analysis. My technical expertise, combined with problem-solving and critical-thinking skills, enables me to
analyze complex datasets and provide actionable insights to drive business optimization. With a passion
for leveraging technology to enhance decision-making, I aim to contribute to innovative and dynamic
environments.

sections.heading: Experience
sections.content:
AUGUST 2025
IT INTERN, ORA DEVELOPER •
Supported IT infrastructure management to maintain seamless daily operations.
•
Addressed user issues through technical support within ticketing frameworks.
•
Facilitated troubleshooting of connectivity issues related to networking activities.
•
Contributed to cybersecurity efforts by monitoring and reporting security
AUGUST 2024
INTERN, COMMERCIAL INTERNATIONAL BANK (CIB) •
Completed a remote internship with exposure to corporate banking and supporting the
credit and risk management teams.
•
Assisted in preparing financial reports, reviewing loan applications, and performing
financial statement audits.
JULY 2024
BPO INTERN, NATIONAL BANK OF EGYPT (NBE) •
was selected among Top Performance interns during 2024 out of 1000 interns for
exceptional contributions to the BPO (Business Process optimization) department.
•
Participated in workshops on financial analysis, risk management
0CTOBER 2023-MARCH 2024
INTERNATIONAL ACCOUNT ADVISOR , VODAFONE UK(VOIS) •
Provide customer service to Vodafone UK customers via inbound calls, resolving issues
efficiently.
•
Manage customer accounts, ensure accurate billing, and assist other departments in
handling complex customer cases.
•
Stay up-to-date with Vodafone products and services to deliver exceptional service and
resolve complaints.

Thanaweya-Amma
Liberty Language school

2021

Cairo,Egypt

SKILLS

Languages — Java, Python, C++,C , Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, Scala Backend Technologies — Spring Boot, Hibernate, REST APIs Databases — PostgreSQL, SQL, Oracle, MySQL Tools — Git, GitHub, Postman, Jira Testing — Selenium Methodologies — Agile (Scrum) Networking — Networking Fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, Subnetting), Windows Server (Active
Directory, Group Policy, DNS, DHCP)

LANGUAGES

Arabic

English

— Native

— Proficient

German

— Conversational

PROJECTS

Quiz-App Backend

2025

• Developed a RESTful backend using Spring Boot with a layered architecture
(Controller, Service, Repository). • Built CRUD APIs to manage quizzes and user data efficiently. • Integrated database access using Spring Data JPA and Hibernate, ensuring
reliable data management.

E-Commerce Backend

2025

• Designed RESTful backend supporting product and order management. • Implemented CRUD APIs and database integration, improving data handling
and system reliability.

• Optimized backend queries for smoother handling of multiple requests.

Job-App Backend

2025

• Created RESTful backend for managing job posts with Spring Boot. • Implemented CRUD operations with PostgreSQL via Hibernate ORM for
consistent data storage. • Enhanced backend performance and maintainability through layered
architecture.

Shop Management System (Java & JavaFX)

2025

• Developed a full point-of-sale and inventory management system with Java
and JavaFX. • Implemented product management, sales processing, barcode search, and
invoice generation. • Designed a relational database with H2 and integrated it using Hibernate
ORM. • Enhanced usability with a responsive UI with search and update operations.

Brain Tumor Classification and Segmentation (Graduation
Project)

07/2024 – 06/2025

• Developed a deep learning model to classify and segment brain tumors from
MRI scans. • Applied CNN and U-Net architectures using Python and medical imaging
datasets.

Movie Sentiment Analysis AI Model

2024

• Built an AI model to analyze and classify sentiment in movie reviews. • Used natural language processing (NLP) techniques with Python and machine
learning libraries.

FCIS Operating system

2023

• Operating system memory management. • Implementing kernel heap and user heap functions using C.

COURSES

Java Spring Framework, Spring Boot, Spring AI - Gen AI⁠

10/2025 – 12/2025

• Strong foundation in Core Java, OOP, JDBC, and building enterprise-level
applications using Spring Boot, Spring MVC/​REST, Spring Data JPA, Spring
Security, and AOP. • Hands-on experience with back-end development, Docker containerization,
microservices basics, and integrating Generative AI using Spring AI.

AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials

09/2025

• Completed AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials with strong knowledge of AWS
core services, global infrastructure, security, IAM, and the shared
responsibility model. • Gained understanding of cloud economics, cost optimization, migration
strategies, edge services, and the AWS Well Architected Framework.

Developing mobile applications using Android
ITI

07/2024

• Kotlin Programming Language. • Android Development with Kotlin. • A hands-on Project: Recipe App⁠: A user-friendly platform for discovering and
saving your favorite recipes.
